title: LodestoneTP
description: A simple quality-of-life data pack that lets you teleport to tracked lodestones and last death locations!
body:
## LodestoneTP LodestoneTP is a Minecraft data pack that introduces a convenient and vanilla-friendly teleportation using compasses and tracked lodestone blocks. It includes many options to personalize your experience and help you balance this feature to your liking.
## Getting Started In Minecraft, a compass used on a lodestone block points toward it. With this data pack, you can sneak while holding that compass to teleport to the lodestone block. To see the coordinates of your tracked compass and other information related to the data pack, you can use this command: ``` /trigger LodestoneTP ```
## Data Pack Options This data pack includes a few options that you can change to your liking. To view and change these options in-game, you can use this command: ``` /function lodestonetp:admin/options ``` Click the options to change them. To set a custom value, type it at the end of its scoreboard command. | Option | Default | Description | | -- | :--: | -- | | Toggle | enabled | Enable or disable teleporting | | On Lodestone | enabled | Toggle if players must stand on a lodestone block to teleport | | Cooldown | 60s | Teleport cooldown | | Sneak Time | 5s | Sneak time to teleport | | Moving Cancel | disabled | Toggle if moving should cancel the teleport | | Damage Cancel | enabled | Toggle if taking damage should cancel the teleport | | Give Resistance | enabled | Toggle if players are resistant to damage for a few seconds after teleporting | | Break Blocks | enabled | Toggle if blocks placed on top of the lodestone should break | | Cross Dimensions | enabled | Toggle if players can teleport to different dimensions | | Progress Bar | enabled | Toggle a progress bar while sneaking | | Break Compass | disabled | Toggle if a compass breaks when used to teleport | | Trigger Info | enabled | Toggle compass information display from `/trigger LodestoneTP` | | Recovery Compass | disabled | Toggle if a recovery compass can be used to teleport to the death location | | ItemCost | unset | Items that get consumed on teleport (supports custom items) | | Default values were chosen with game balance in mind, but they're up to personal preference, so don't be afraid to change them to your liking!
